editions.label: A Gāndhārī Version of the Dārukkhandopamasutta

lemmas.translation: (the state of being) caught by a whirlpool
on the way to the ocean
having ocean as the final end
[one in the] retinue of a god
having final cessation as the end
perfection of (the path of) the pure mode of conduct
way to an aim or end
